productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Solid Navy Blue Bag
description: If cool is your middle name, this navy blue training bag belongs in your collection. Perfect for gym sessions or football practice, this fabulous bag can carry all your training gear. Go anywhere and always bring out your best with this cool bag from nike. Made from 100% polyester on the outside and 100% nylon lining for durability Large and roomy main compartment for all your training gear with a small zippered pocket for stowing away essentials Two short handles and a long removable shoulder strap with a padded grip One zippered compartment for enhanced space One zippered compartment on the side with a mesh upper for your sneakers Panel stitched at the bottom for enhanced durability FCB applique and brand swoosh on the front Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not bleach,iron or dry clean
